name: OpenReview Submission — Open Peer Review
value: HIGH — no endorsement needed, indexed by Semantic Scholar, public peer review history
notes: OpenReview supports independent preprint submissions. No gatekeeping. Public reviews build credibility and generate discussion. Indexed by Semantic Scholar within days.
steps: Select venue: 'OpenReview Preprints' (or similar general track)
Link the OpenReview URL in jrlopez.dev article
post_actions: Share OpenReview URL for community feedback
Respond to any public reviews promptly
Use reviewer comments to strengthen USENIX submission
